ogTitle: Avoca Dell vs Back Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Avoca Dell and Back Valley.
heading: Avoca Dell vs Back Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Avoca Dell, South Australia and Back Valley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Back Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Avoca Dell (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Avoca Dell or Back Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Avoca Dell has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Back Valley scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Avoca Dell scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Back Valley scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Avoca Dell or Back Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Back Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
